objective: Review the crates.io publication readiness implementation for grove-core and grove workspace crates.
key_changes: cli/Cargo.toml line 19 correctly contains grove-core = { path = "../core", version = "=0.1.11" }
cargo publish --dry-run -p grove-core exits 0 with aborting upload message — verified
cargo publish --dry-run -p grove fails with grove-core version not found — correct, proves pin is active
bump-version.sh step 3/6 updates the exact-version pin atomically with version bumps
RELEASING.md step 5 documents cargo publish order (grove-core first, then grove)
RELEASING.md ordering constraint bullet explains why core must precede cli on crates.io
cargo test --release --locked --workspace passes all tests — no regressions
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0 — lint clean
Perl regex in bump-version.sh correctly handles in-place update of version pin
All step numbering in bump-version.sh and RELEASING.md correctly adjusted
